pr.title: feat: Non-record 11L PR940 Stack (no n-gram in use) + 20k Steps + Legal TTT (1.0929 BPB)

output.summary: Extends the PR940 stack with gated attention/value residual and all-layer XSA, training the 11L Muon model through a 12k-step warmdown and legal score-first TTT.
techniques: LeakyReLU² MLP + gated attention/value residual on all 11 layers
Cosine warmdown from 8k–20k steps with large token batches
Muon optimizer paired with legal score-first TTT evaluations
